tutorial.label: Quick tutorial
tutorial.smartBody: Type what you ate naturally and Smartfood instantly logs your calories and macros using AI. No searching, no fuss.
tutorial.proBody: Switch to Pro for exact tracking. Build meals from 36 built-in foods or create and save your own custom foods.
tutorial.logBody: Every meal is saved in your Food Log. Tap any entry to see the full breakdown, edit the numbers, or delete it.
tutorial.menuBody: The Menu tab shows what you can still eat today to hit your calorie and macro goals. Great for planning ahead.
tutorial.progressBody: Log your weight each day to track changes over time. See trends and stay motivated on your journey.

auth.privacy: Your data is private and encrypted.
auth.sentLink: We sent a confirmation link to
auth.step3: You’ll be taken directly to account setup
auth.noEmail: Didn’t receive it? Check your spam folder, or

settings.title: Settings
settings.smartDesc: AI-powered — describe meals in plain text, the AI logs the macros
settings.proDesc: Manual precision — search foods, set exact portions, build meals
settings.helpDesc: Replay the quick walkthrough to learn how Smartfood works.
settings.darkDesc: Easy on the eyes in low light

foodLog.nothingDay: No food logged for this day.
foodLog.logHint: Go to Home and use the chat to log your meals
